name: beaver-buddy
description: Pixel-art desktop beaver overlay for macOS

scripts.build: tsc && tsc -p src/renderer/tsconfig.json && cp src/renderer/index.html dist/renderer/index.html && mkdir -p dist/renderer/assets && rm -rf dist/renderer/assets/sprites && cp -R assets/sprites dist/renderer/assets/sprites && cp src/main/mrr/settings.html dist/main/mrr/settings.html
